content.text:
I mean... stressed is just -- that's just the baseline, right? Like everyone's stressed. It's not -- I don't think that's the thing. The thing is I have a one-on-one with my director on Thursday and I haven't prepped it, and my team lead keeps coming to me with stuff I don't have answers for yet, and my mom's birthday is -- god, I still haven't gotten a card -- and my partner and I haven't had a real conversation in like two weeks because by the time the kids are down we're both just... 

Anyway. The stressed thing. Yeah. It's just a lot of inputs, you know? It's not like something's *wrong* wrong.
